programmes.show_description: LASIK Instinct: Anarchic animated sitcom. Lois decides to get LASIK surgery and attempts to exploit her failing vision for personal gain, and the guys help a father-neglected Doug.
One If by Clam, Two If by Sea: Subversive animated comedy. When a hurricane destroys Quahog, The Drunken Clam is rebuilt by a Brit who turns it into an English pub.
Steve's Franken Out: US animated comedy series. When Principal Lewis threatens to cancel science club, Steve takes matters into his own hands in a monstrous way.
Dr. Sunderson's Sunsuckers: US animated comedy series. Hayley and Jeff help one of Roger's personas run a solar company.
The Phallus: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. When the boys meet an old school friend who is now a hotshot urban lawyer, Stylax uses his mate to reconnect with an old flame of his.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The Night the Clown Cried II: Tears of Doom!: Animated adventures. Crybaby Clown is back with a vengeance, kidnapping the citizens of Crystal Cove - including Daphne!
Web of the Dreamweaver: Animated adventures. The gang investigate the mystery of the Dreamweaver, an evil wizard who is causing citizens to destroy the things they love the most.
American Goth: Animated adventure series. Shaggy discovers that his friend Amelia has become a Goth and decides to become one too, but an evil plant monster has other ideas...
Omelettes Are Forever: Animated adventure series. The gang get caught up in international espionage and intrigue when they cross paths with a British secret agent on a mission.
The fashion-themed dating challenge continues. Whose style choices will impress Nate from Nottingham?

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. Billie and Greg attempt to restore order by introducing chores to allow the kids to learn about the value of money, but not everyone is on board.
The sun in Portugal isn't the only thing that's getting our Essex crew hot and bothered as Harry and Freddie go head-to-head and Saff has a heated confrontation with Chloe.
Cheatin' Heart: Kenya unleashes her opinions on Cynthia, and Porsha drops an unexpected bombshell. Cynthia and Kandi try to clean up the aftermath of the Barbie Bash.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Mind Your Business: US reality series. Dorit and PK reconnect as Erika senses a trap, and old wounds reopen when Sutton confronts her mother at her childhood home.
Husband-and-wife Ricky and Manisha try to win some life-changing money before brainy brothers Alistair and Ashley aim to climb as far up the Limitless Ladder as possible.
Graham Norton welcomes events assistant Alex, weight loss coach Jennifer, and business owner Chris as they face each other and try to beat the Wheel for a possible 50,000 pounds.
The Portugal trip is coming to an end - while some of the group have had a great time, others are looking forward to getting back to Essex and escaping the dramas.
Never Have I Ever...: Reality series. A rumoured voice note creates an iconic showdown between Paige and Seema as things continue to go from bad to worse.
The Float Goes On: US reality series. Kenya confides in her family that she and Marc are having problems, and the ladies head to New York City for WorldPride.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Land of the Free, Home of the Shade: US reality series. Dorit tries to lift her spirits with a Fourth of July BBQ where Sutton sees red, white and blue over a joke.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Lucrezia Millarini, Judi Love and Ben Miller all trying to guess the well-known phrases in aid of charity.
Graham Norton welcomes office manager Shirley, financial management assistant Cameron, and police investigation officer Adele as they take on the Wheel for up to 50,000 pounds.
Ant and Dec try to help two family teams - brothers Alistair and Ashley, then aunt and nephew Denise and Pablo - win truly life-changing money as they take on the Limitless Ladder.
Lee Mack presents the quiz show that the whole family can play together as 100 contestants try to make it to the end to answer a question that could be worth up to 100,000 pounds.
Rock Hard: Anarchic animated sitcom. While hanging around at an old record store, Peter and the guys tell stories about three rock music legends.
The 2,000-Year-Old-Virgin: Animated comedy. Peter and the guys set out to throw Jesus the best birthday party ever to help him lose his virginity.
Bookie of the Year: Animated comedy. Chris's baseball skills prove lucrative. In a show dedicated to his memory, Frank Sinatra Jr opens an Italian restaurant with Stewie and Brian.
What Great Advancements!: US animated comedy series. In an episode paying homage to Charlie Chaplin, Stan is a modest inventor who leaves his farm to try his luck in the big city.
Family Time: US animated comedy series. Stan and the family go out to dinner at a buffet restaurant, and Roger becomes a flower.
Running Down a Gene: Animated comedy. Gene tries to remember a perfect song that he wrote in his sleep, and Louise and Tina try to catch a cricket that is keeping Linda up at night.
Fight at the Not Okay Chore-Ral: Animated comedy. The Belchers end up in a bedtime story showdown when Bob and Linda suggest that the kids should take on more household chores.
The Race: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. Marcus and Stylax try to raise 3,000 denarii to avoid the girls being deported, and Grumio visits Landlord in prison through a sewage pipe.
Stephen Mulhern hosts another exciting edition of the gameshow as one of his brave contestants takes on the infamous Banker and could be in with a chance of a life-changing prize.
Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.
Shopping from home.
The Hodag of Horror: Animated adventures. In pursuit of the mythical Hodag beast, the Mystery Inc. gang find something much more valuable - the fourth planispheric disc piece!
Art of Darkness: Animated adventures with Scooby and the gang. Crystal Cove welcomes artist Randy Warsaw, whose latest work comes to life and attacks patrons of the museum.
Ghost of Mystery Machine: Animated adventure series. Fred's worst nightmare comes true when an evil spirit possesses the Mystery Machine and turns his beloved van into a monster.
Naughty or Nice: Animated adventure series. When Daphne brings the gang to a fancy ice hotel for the opening of an exhibit of ice age artefacts, a frozen ice man goes on a rampage...
In London, Jessica, Shai and Harley all hope to impress model and personal trainer Robbie with their style choices.

programmes.show_name: Billie and Greg: The Family Diaries
programmes.show_description: Reality series. As the novelty of the chore chart wears off, Billie and Greg continue to address the kids' behaviour and debate if they should get Nelly a phone.
The Portugal trip is coming to an end - while some of the group have had a great time, others are looking forward to getting back to Essex and escaping the dramas.
The Float Goes On: US reality series. Kenya confides in her family that she and Marc are having problems, and the ladies head to New York City for WorldPride.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Land of the Free, Home of the Shade: US reality series. Dorit tries to lift her spirits with a Fourth of July BBQ where Sutton sees red, white and blue over a joke.
Ant and Dec try to help two family teams - brothers Alistair and Ashley, then aunt and nephew Denise and Pablo - win truly life-changing money as they take on the Limitless Ladder.
Graham Norton hosts as solicitor Sapna, work planner Ben, and custody officer Deborah take on the Wheel and some head-scratching puzzles to win a possible 50,000 pounds.
The group are back in Essex as Dan gets some motherly advice from Wendy, Joe and Junaid spend quality time with Terry, and Diags surprises Bear with a teddy bear-themed party.
Demolition Woman: Reality series. The Housewives are divided over Paige's dramatic exit that left Ell caught in the middle, and Rachel and Seema pay Nermina a visit.
Love, Marriage, and Sour Peaches: Cynthia and NeNe meet for the first time since their fall-out last year. Porsha grapples with the fact that Dennis was unfaithful.

programmes.show_name: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills
programmes.show_description: Caviar Catastrophe: US reality series. Sutton and Dorit's feud gets dirty when a food fight almost breaks out at a lunch, and Bozoma's fertility hopes are checked.
Stephen Mulhern hosts a celebrity special of the classic game show with Ade Adepitan, Clare Balding, and Robert Webb all trying to 'say what they see' in aid of charity.
Graham Norton welcomes events assistant Alex, weight loss coach Jennifer, and business owner Chris as they face each other and try to beat the Wheel for a possible 50,000 pounds.
There's more life-changing money on offer and surprises in store as Ant and Dec introduce father and daughter Paul and Tegan - and friends Abbi and Amy - to the Limitless Ladder.
Must Love Dogs: Anarchic animated sitcom. Quagmire pretends that Brian is his dog when he meets an avid dog lover, and Chris helps Stewie retrieve some stolen Halloween candy.
80's Guy: Anarchic animated sitcom. Peter's nostalgia for the '80s compels him to recreate iconic film scenes from that decade, and Stewie competes with Doug to retrieve a frisbee.
The Dating Game: Quagmire becomes obsessed with dating apps, but loses his sexual prowess. Stewie enjoys the extra attention when he is forced to wear a back brace.
V Is for Mystery: Stewie and Brian solve a series of mysterious murders in Victorian London in a homage to Charles Dickens.
Livin' on a Prayer: Animated US comedy. When Stewie's new friend falls ill, Lois takes him to the hospital, but the boy's parents refuse treatment due to their religious beliefs.
Langley Dollar Listings: US animated comedy series. Francine and Roger become reality TV real estate agents, and the other Smiths start a coffee business in their front yard.
